name: Guardragon Corewakening
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>核</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>醒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can send 1 Effect Monster from your hand to the GY; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon Normal Monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, in Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Guardragon Corewakening" once per turn.
eff: You can send 1 Effect Monster from your hand to the GY; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon Normal Monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, in Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Guardragon Corewakening" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
